name: template-playwright-pom
description: Template de automatizacion E2E con TypeScript, Playwright, Cucumber y Page Object Model.

scripts.test:headed: npm run clean:artifacts && cross-env HEADLESS=false cucumber-js
scripts.test:debug: npm run clean:artifacts && cross-env HEADLESS=false PWDEBUG=1 cucumber-js --tags "not @requiresCredentials"
scripts.test:all: npm run clean:artifacts && cross-env CUCUMBER_TAGS="" cucumber-js
scripts.test:login: npm run clean:artifacts && cross-env CUCUMBER_TAGS="@login and not @requiresCredentials" cucumber-js
scripts.test:credentials: npm run clean:artifacts && cross-env CUCUMBER_TAGS="@requiresCredentials" cucumber-js
scripts.report: npm run clean:artifacts && cucumber-js --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html
